content.json:
## Error Analysis Dashboard
Proactive issue detection. Errors are identified by a non-empty `errorCategory` dimension (set by `trackError`).

content.query:
customEvents
| where isnotempty(tostring(customDimensions.errorCategory))
| summarize Errors = count(), UsersAffected = dcount(user_Id) by Operation = tostring(split(name, "/")[-1]), Category = tostring(customDimensions.errorCategory)
| order by Errors desc
| take 20
| render barchart
content.title: Top Failing Operations

content.query:
customEvents
| where isnotempty(tostring(customDimensions.errorCategory))
| summarize Errors = count() by Category = tostring(customDimensions.errorCategory), Day = bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by Day asc
| render timechart
content.title: Error Volume by Category Over Time

content.query:
let baseline = customEvents
    | where timestamp between (ago(8d) .. ago(1d))
    | where isnotempty(tostring(customDimensions.errorCategory))
    | summarize by Operation = tostring(split(name, "/")[-1]), Category = tostring(customDimensions.errorCategory);
customEvents
| where timestamp > ago(1d)
| where isnotempty(tostring(customDimensions.errorCategory))
| summarize Count = count() by Operation = tostring(split(name, "/")[-1]), Category = tostring(customDimensions.errorCategory)
| join kind=leftanti baseline on Operation, Category
| extend Alert = "NEW ERROR (last 24h)"
| project Alert, Operation, Category, Count
| order by Count desc
content.title: New Error Types (Last 24h vs prior week)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name endswith "/connection.connectCompleted"
| where isnotempty(tostring(customDimensions.errorCategory))
| summarize Failures = count() by Category = tostring(customDimensions.errorCategory), bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc
| render timechart
content.title: Connection Failures by Category

content.query:
customEvents
| where isnotempty(tostring(customDimensions.errorCategory))
| project timestamp, Operation = tostring(split(name, "/")[-1]), Category = tostring(customDimensions.errorCategory), Version = tostring(customDimensions.extensionVersion), Host = tostring(customDimensions.hostName)
| order by timestamp desc
| take 100
content.title: Recent Errors (raw)
